text: The surgeon prepares polydocanol foam by mixing 1.6 ml of liquid polydocanol at 3% concentration with 7.4 ml of sterile air using the Easy Foam Kit syringe system, visible in the setup.

The surgeon performs sclerotherapy on hemorrhoidal piles using a modified Blanc Blanchard technique. A self-lighting open-ended anoscope and XXG needle are used to inject polydocanol foam tangentially above the dentate line to minimize postoperative pain and complications. The procedure is repeated for each pile, including the one located at the eleven o'clock position.
